question: How do neuropeptides differ from classical neurotransmitters in release?
options: Neuropeptides require high-frequency stimulation and are released from dense-core vesicles
Neuropeptides are not released from neurons
They are released from all vesicles equally
explanation: Unlike small-molecule neurotransmitters in synaptic vesicles, neuropeptides are released from large dense-core vesicles that require sustained high-frequency neuronal firing.
